profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Idea Indonesia Akademi Tbk focuses on recruiting, training, and distribution of hospitality human resources in collaboration with hotel chains and cruise line companies in Indonesia. The company operates in Educational institutions, HOTEL, and Management Services segments. It develops and provides hotel and restaurant services, as well as engages in the hospitality; and professional, scientific, and technical activities. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.
